## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check:syntax`
- [ ] `npm run check:install`
- [ ] `npm run smoke` against a confirmed bridge
- [ ] Live Excel verification, if claimed

## Safety and rollback

- [ ] No workbook/client data, tokens, attachments, or logs
- [ ] Structured action, auth, Host/Origin, Undo, installer, and rollback boundaries considered
